question: The bar chart shows the output by year from 2018 to 2022. Which statement about the trend in output is best supported by the chart?

options.A: Output increased in every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.B: Output in 2019 was higher than in 2018.
options.C: The middle year had the highest output.
options.D: Output in the last two years is identical.

explanation: Values exceeding the y-axis range are clipped, making the top bars look the same and misleading viewers.
